description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather wallet. With lots of space for all your monetary essentials and classy stitch detailing, this wallet in black makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas two main compartments with a zipped compartmentEight credit card slots with two slip pockets and a sim card holderPen holder in the middleBrand name appliqued on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 9.5 cm
